claude.name: planner
claude.description: Expert planning specialist for complex features and refactoring. Use PROACTIVELY when users request feature implementation, architectural changes, or complex refactoring. Automatically activated for planning tasks.

gemini.name: planner
gemini.description: Expert planning specialist for complex features and refactoring. Use PROACTIVELY when users request feature implementation, architectural changes, or complex refactoring.

claude.name: tdd-guide
claude.description: Test-Driven Development specialist enforcing write-tests-first methodology. Use PROACTIVELY when writing new features, fixing bugs, or refactoring code. Ensures 80%+ test coverage.

gemini.name: tdd-guide
gemini.description: Test-Driven Development specialist enforcing write-tests-first methodology. Use PROACTIVELY when writing new features, fixing bugs, or refactoring code. Ensures 80%+ test coverage.

claude.name: code-reviewer
claude.description: Expert code review specialist. Proactively reviews code for quality, security, and maintainability. Use immediately after writing or modifying code. MUST BE USED for all code changes.

gemini.name: code-reviewer
gemini.description: Expert code review specialist. Reviews code for quality, security, and maintainability. Use after writing or modifying code.

claude.name: architect
claude.description: Software architecture specialist for system design, scalability, and technical decision-making. Use PROACTIVELY when planning new features, refactoring large systems, or making architectural decisions.

gemini.name: architect
gemini.description: Software architecture specialist for system design, scalability, and technical decision-making. Use when planning new features or making architectural decisions.

claude.name: security-reviewer
claude.description: Security vulnerability detection and remediation specialist. Use PROACTIVELY after writing code that handles user input, authentication, API endpoints, or sensitive data. Flags secrets, SSRF, injection, unsafe crypto, and OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.

gemini.name: security-reviewer
gemini.description: Security vulnerability detection and remediation specialist. Use after writing code that handles user input, authentication, API endpoints, or sensitive data.

claude.name: build-error-resolver
claude.description: Build and TypeScript error resolution specialist. Use PROACTIVELY when build fails or type errors occur. Fixes build/type errors only with minimal diffs, no architectural edits. Focuses on getting the build green quickly.

gemini.name: build-error-resolver
gemini.description: Build and TypeScript error resolution specialist. Use when build fails or type errors occur. Fixes errors only with minimal diffs.

claude.name: database-reviewer
claude.description: PostgreSQL database specialist for query optimization, schema design, security, and performance. Use PROACTIVELY when writing SQL, creating migrations, designing schemas, or troubleshooting database performance. Incorporates Supabase best practices.

gemini.name: database-reviewer
gemini.description: PostgreSQL database specialist for query optimization, schema design, security, and performance. Use when writing SQL, creating migrations, or troubleshooting database performance.

claude.name: e2e-runner
claude.description: End-to-end testing specialist using Vercel Agent Browser (preferred) with Playwright fallback. Use PROACTIVELY for generating, maintaining, and running E2E tests. Manages test journeys, quarantines flaky tests, uploads artifacts (screenshots, videos, traces), and ensures critical user flows work.

gemini.name: e2e-runner
gemini.description: End-to-end testing specialist using Playwright. Use for generating, maintaining, and running E2E tests on critical user flows.

claude.name: refactor-cleaner
claude.description: Dead code cleanup and consolidation specialist. Use PROACTIVELY for removing unused code, duplicates, and refactoring. Runs analysis tools (knip, depcheck, ts-prune) to identify dead code and safely removes it.

gemini.name: refactor-cleaner
gemini.description: Dead code cleanup and consolidation specialist. Use for removing unused code, duplicates, and refactoring.

claude.name: harness-optimizer
claude.description: Analyzes and improves agent harness for reliability and cost. Runs /harness-audit baseline, identifies top 3 leverage areas, proposes minimal reversible changes, applies and validates, reports deltas.

gemini.name: harness-optimizer
gemini.description: Analyzes and improves agent harness for reliability and cost. Runs harness audit baseline, identifies top 3 leverage areas, proposes minimal reversible changes, applies and validates.
